name: Can I do voice assistant optimization on a limited budget?
description: Yes. Start with your highest-value pages, rewrite the answers, and add basic schema before investing in larger content work.

mainEntity.name: Can I do voice assistant optimization on a limited budget?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you want a low-budget path, begin with the pages that already get traffic and rewrite the top questions first. Then add free or low-cost schema updates, improve mobile speed, and measure the impact before expanding.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Start with your highest-value pages, rewrite the answers, and add basic schema before investing in larger content work.
